cells.text: 2f extra recovery on whiff; useful combo tool with a Target Combo follow-up; extends a wider body hurtbox until the end of recovery
cells.html: 2f extra recovery on whiff; useful combo tool with a Target Combo follow-up; extends a wider body hurtbox until the end of recovery

cells.text: Forces stand on hit (allowing Target Combo follow-up to work on crouching opponents); good poke with hitbox priority, many active frames, and a reactable hitconfirm window
cells.html: Forces stand on hit (allowing Target Combo follow-up to work on crouching opponents); good poke with hitbox priority, many active frames, and a reactable hitconfirm window

cells.text: Good range for a 5f light (useful in punishes and neutral buffers); DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame
cells.html: Good range for a 5f light (useful in punishes and neutral buffers); DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: Solid poke; front leg hurtbox is raised on frames 4-11 (can avoid low pokes)
cells.html: Solid poke; front leg hurtbox is raised on frames 4-11 (can avoid low pokes)

cells.text: Whiffs on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; 2 extra recovery frames on block; good horizontal anti-air that puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (higher launch on Punish Counter juggle); +11 before Punish Counter crumple state goes airborne; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles
cells.html: Whiffs on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; 2 extra recovery frames on block; good horizontal anti-air that puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (higher launch on Punish Counter juggle); +11 before Punish Counter crumple state goes airborne; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-5 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)
cells.html: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-5 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

cells.text: 2f extra recovery on whiff; combo and pressure tool; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-9 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air); extends a wider hurtbox until the end of recovery
cells.html: 2f extra recovery on whiff; combo and pressure tool; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-9 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air); extends a wider hurtbox until the end of recovery

cells.text: Forces stand on hit; decent anti-air; cannot hit cross-ups; fist hurtbox is invincible to air strikes on frame 9; head hurtbox is invincible to air strikes on frames 10-14; only 1st active frame is cancelable (extends a combo-only hitbox to match the range of the 2nd active frame for combo consistency); () refers to hit/block recovery on 1st active frame only; 5f less hitstun on active frames 2-5 (can be punishable on meaty timing)
cells.html: Forces stand on hit; decent anti-air; cannot hit cross-ups; fist hurtbox is invincible to air strikes on frame 9; head hurtbox is invincible to air strikes on frames 10-14; only 1st active frame is cancelable (extends a combo-only hitbox to match the range of the 2nd active frame for combo consistency); () refers to hit/block recovery on 1st active frame only; 5f less hitstun on active frames 2-5 (can be punishable on meaty timing)

cells.text: Range: 1.482; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames
cells.html: Range: 1.482; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

cells.text: Good range and hitbox priority; has some juggle potential; on block, always plays out a fixed 29f recovery (cannot be made safer with meaty timing)
cells.html: Good range and hitbox priority; has some juggle potential; on block, always plays out a fixed 29f recovery (cannot be made safer with meaty timing)

cells.text: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead
cells.html: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead

cells.text: Both hits are cancelable to Air Tatsu and put airborne opponents into a limited juggle state; if 1st hit is stand blocked, the 2nd hit will not hit overhead against crouch block; lower body projectile invuln 8-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Both hits are cancelable to Air Tatsu and put airborne opponents into a limited juggle state; if 1st hit is stand blocked, the 2nd hit will not hit overhead against crouch block; lower body projectile invuln 8-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Spike knockdown on counter hit/Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Spike knockdown on counter hit/Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 7-20f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 7-20f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Strong jump-in from mid to long range; lower body projectile invuln 10-17f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Strong jump-in from mid to long range; lower body projectile invuln 10-17f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Counter-hit/Punish Counter/Drive Rush frame advantage applies to both hits; 2nd hit is no longer an overhead if the first hit connects; up to +5 on hit with meaty timing for a meterless combo extension
cells.html: Counter-hit/Punish Counter/Drive Rush frame advantage applies to both hits; 2nd hit is no longer an overhead if the first hit connects; up to +5 on hit with meaty timing for a meterless combo extension

cells.text: 2 hits; good forward-moving combo starter and pressure tool; if 1st hit connects on an extended hurtbox, becomes +6 on Counter-hit or +8 on Punish Counter; Counter-hit/Punish Counter frame advantage applies to both hits; can be very advantageous if 1st hit trades with a light normal; 1st hit puts opponent into free juggle state so that the 2nd hit connects (to prevent Ryu from being punishable)
cells.html: 2 hits; good forward-moving combo starter and pressure tool; if 1st hit connects on an extended hurtbox, becomes +6 on Counter-hit or +8 on Punish Counter; Counter-hit/Punish Counter frame advantage applies to both hits; can be very advantageous if 1st hit trades with a light normal; 1st hit puts opponent into free juggle state so that the 2nd hit connects (to prevent Ryu from being punishable)

cells.text: Forces stand on hit; only 1st active frame is cancelable; () refers to hit/block recovery on 1st active frame only; extremely short range makes it finicky in combos; 8f less hitstun on active frames 2-4 (can be punishable with meaty timing)
cells.html: Forces stand on hit; only 1st active frame is cancelable; () refers to hit/block recovery on 1st active frame only; extremely short range makes it finicky in combos; 8f less hitstun on active frames 2-4 (can be punishable with meaty timing)

cells.text: () refers to 2nd hit startup; 1st hit forces stand and puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state; 2nd hit puts airborne opponents into OTG bounce state; both hits are cancelable; Counter-hit and Punish Counter frame advantage applies to both hits
cells.html: () refers to 2nd hit startup; 1st hit forces stand and puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state; 2nd hit puts airborne opponents into OTG bounce state; both hits are cancelable; Counter-hit and Punish Counter frame advantage applies to both hits

cells.text: Cancelable to regular/OD Air Tatsu on hit/block; Low Crush on frames 13-20 (not airborne); high pushback on block; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; good juggle option after midscreen OD High Blade Kick for corner carry and oki; proximity guard box begins on frame 2 and reaches the maximum attack range (prevents opponents from walking back out of the attack startup)
cells.html: Cancelable to regular/OD Air Tatsu on hit/block; Low Crush on frames 13-20 (not airborne); high pushback on block; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; good juggle option after midscreen OD High Blade Kick for corner carry and oki; proximity guard box begins on frame 2 and reaches the maximum attack range (prevents opponents from walking back out of the attack startup)

cells.text: Hits consistently at max 5MP range, but the LK can whiff if 5MP connects on an extended hurtbox; can be spaced safely against most characters for a spacing trap
cells.html: Hits consistently at max 5MP range, but the LK can whiff if 5MP connects on an extended hurtbox; can be spaced safely against most characters for a spacing trap

cells.text: (refers to scaled damage); 6f gap before HK on block; cancels to Denjin Charge by inputting 2P on hit only (KD Adv. +7)
cells.html: (refers to scaled damage); 6f gap before HK on block; cancels to Denjin Charge by inputting 2P on hit only (KD Adv. +7)

cells.text: HK cannot hit vs. crouch block (much more unsafe); cancels to Denjin Charge by inputting 2P on hit only (KD Adv. +10); can juggle into MP/OD Shoryuken or SA3 in the corner

cells.text: Has access to corner throw loops without walking or dashing (whiff 5LP or manually time the next throw); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: Has access to corner throw loops without walking or dashing (whiff 5LP or manually time the next throw); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: Side switches; no throw/strike oki after back throwing opponent into corner; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.
cells.html: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.

cells.text: Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.
cells.html: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 0.525 (min/throw), 1.878 (min/block), 3.628 (max/final DR frame)
cells.html: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 0.525 (min/throw), 1.878 (min/block), 3.628 (max/final DR frame)

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties
